patch.value: Track removal of TOON upstream bracket-bug workaround when upstream fix ships
toon-decode.ts carries escapeBracketsInQuotedScalars to work around a known @toon-format/toon strict-decoder bug; extra code on the hot parse path with no watch item for the upstream fix.
Track the upstream issue/PR; on fix: upgrade dep, verify toon-decode.spec passes without the escape function, remove the workaround+retry branch; no parse-coverage regression.
toon-decode.ts carries escapeBracketsInQuotedScalars to work around a known @toon-format/toon strict-decoder bug; extra code on the hot parse path with no watch item for the upstream fix.

author: codex-agent
message: Start upstream TOON workaround tracking and guard-test hardening.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Orientation baseline: @toon-format/toon latest npm=2.3.0; upstream decoder fix appears as open PR https://github.com/toon-format/toon/pull/314 (not merged/released yet). Therefore workaround remains required for now; this cycle will add explicit traceability + tests and keep removal guarded for post-release upgrade.

value.note: Explicit upstream tracking metadata + retained strict retry workaround
Guard tests for workaround behavior and upstream linkage
Validate scalar-bracket workaround behavior and tracking metadata

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Added explicit in-repo tracking constants for the upstream fix watch (dependency=@toon-format/toon, affected_versions<=2.3.0, upstream_pr=https://github.com/toon-format/toon/pull/314, removal_condition text) and guard tests that (1) ensure quoted-scalar bracket recovery still works while preserving array-header semantics and (2) assert upstream linkage remains documented for future removal. Verification: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/toon-decode.spec.ts.

value.author: manual-smoke
value.text: Verification evidence for TOON workaround tracking changes: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/toon-decode.spec.ts passed; full gate suite and packed-install manual smoke (including history/history-compact/restore round-trip) also passed on this branch without parse-regression symptoms.
